chapter_title.en: The Prayer of Sitting and Glorification, Which is the Prayer of ja'far Ibn Abi Talib

text: 1535 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ اَلْمُغِيرَةِ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «اِقْرَأْ فِي صَلاَةِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ بِ‍ «قُلْ هُوَ اَللّٰهُ أَحَدٌ» وَ «قُلْ يٰا أَيُّهَا اَلْكٰافِرُونَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1535 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn al-Mughirah, from Imam Al-Sadiq (as),
Imam (as) said: "Recite in the Salat of Ja'far (as) 'Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad' (Surah Al-Ikhlas) and ‘Qul ya-ayyuhal kaafirun’ (Surah al-Kafirun)."
